description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the .build directory per job with a key of $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. Add a linux-4.1 job using the swift:4.1 image that runs "swift build" then "swift test", and a linux-4.2 job using the norionomura/swift:swift-4.2-branch image that runs the same commands. Add a linux-release-4.1 job using swift:4.1 that runs "swift build -c release" and a linux-release-4.2 job using norionomura/swift:swift-4.2-branch that runs "swift build -c release". Finally add a swiftlint job using the norionomura/swiftlint image that runs "swiftlint". All jobs run in the default stage and share the defined cache.
